title: Isolate test repositories from CI baseline environment

sources.reason: Shows temporary-repository tests inheriting workflow AI_BASE_COMMIT and rejecting a commit absent from the fixture repository.
Exercises fixture-local Git baselines and the one test that intentionally sets AI_BASE_COMMIT.

riskAssessment.reason: A global CI baseline is valid for repository checks but must not leak into tests that create independent Git repositories.

executionDecision.reason: The failure is reproducible by setting AI_BASE_COMMIT while running the fixture-repository tests.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the fixture clears AI_BASE_COMMIT by default while tests can still opt in with monkeypatch.setenv.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Temporary-repository tests do not inherit the workflow-level AI_BASE_COMMIT.
The explicit environment-override test continues to verify runtime precedence.
The six reported failures pass when the suite is run with AI_BASE_COMMIT set to the previous repository commit.
The complete quality and AI governance checks pass.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
